zh.lifeSummary: 當Jenor Wallacomb於1560年出生在英國肯特可藍別盧可時，她的父親John Wollacomb II31歲，母親Mary Bassett38歲。她於1582年與John Barrett在英國結婚。她去世於1658年8月25日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可康可德享年98歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jenor Wallacomb于1560年出生在英国肯特可藍別盧可时，她的父亲John Wollacomb II31岁，母亲Mary Bassett38岁。她于1582年与John Barrett在英国结婚。她去世于1658年8月25日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可康可德享年98岁。

nameMeanings.name: Jenor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Candido, Rodolfo, Rosita, Alejandro, Benedicto, Camilo, Catalino, Constancia, Damaso, Ernesto, Eugenio, Evelio.
Spanish, Portuguese, and Catalan: distinguishing name for the younger of two bearers of the same first name, from menor ‘smaller, lesser; younger’ (from Latin minor).

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Jenor Wallacomb was born in 1560, in Cranbrook, Kent, England, her father, John Wollacomb II, was 31 and her mother, Mary Bassett, was 38. She married John Barrett in 1582, in England. She died on 25 August 1658, in Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 98.

Elle a épousé John Barrett en 1582, à Angleterre. Elle est décédée le 25 août 1658, à Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 98 ans.

ko.Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Co: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 콘코르드
ko.lifeSummary: Jenor Wallacomb(이)가 1560년 영국 켄트 크랜브룩에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Wollacomb II(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Bassett(은)는 38세였다. 그녀는 1582년 영국에서 John Barrett(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1658년 8월 25일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 콘코르드에서 98세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com John Barrett em 1582, em Inglaterra. Ela faleceu em 25 de agosto de 1658, em Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 98 anos.

ru.Concord, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Co: конкорд, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jenor Wallacomb родилась в 1560 г. в местности кранбрук, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени John Wollacomb II было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mary Bassett, 38. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Barrett в 1582 г. в местности Англия. Она умерла 25 августа 1658 г. в местности конкорд, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 98 лет.
